title: glandularia elegans
intro: Glandularia elegans, also known as the Rosy Verbena or Verbena rigida, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It is native to the Americas, particularly in the mountainous regions of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Glandularia elegans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and stress, and promote overall well-being and relaxation.
